channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Comeback Season 3 explores AI in television and Valerie Cherish’s evolution
item.description: After a twelve-year hiatus, Lisa Kudrow returns as Valerie Cherish in Season 3 of The Comeback, now streaming on HBO and Crave in Canada. Unlike previous seasons, which followed Valerie navigating rea...

item.title: Inspekta Mwala Poses with Retired Vitimbi Actor Likobe at Funeral
item.description: Davis Mwabili, better known as Inspekta Mwala, recently shared a nostalgic photo with the legendary Vitimbi actor, Likobe, during a funeral, sparking excitement among fans. Likobe, whose real name is ...

item.title: Nine injured including four policemen in Lakki Marwat IED explosion
item.description: Nine individuals, including four policemen, sustained injuries in an improvised explosive device (IED) attack in the Serai Naurang area of Lakki Marwat district, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, on Wednesday. Acco...

item.title: Dough Works Limited expansion boosts jobs and economic activity in Tanzania
item.description: Dough Works Limited (DWL), the company operating KFC and Pizza Hut in Tanzania, has created over 800 jobs as it continues to grow its presence in the local market. The firm has recently opened its 13t...

item.title: The Rise of Sleep Tourism: Destinations for Rest and Well-Being
item.description: Sleep tourism is emerging as a notable trend in wellness travel, focusing on improving sleep quality and reducing stress, burnout, and chronic fatigue. Unlike traditional holidays centred on sightseei...

item.title: Six Metropolitan Police officers investigated over injury of 16-year-old during stop and search in north London
item.description: Six Metropolitan Police officers are under investigation after a 16-year-old Black boy sustained a fractured knee during a stop and search operation in Tottenham, north London, in April 2025. Accordin...

item.title: Meet the Artemis II Crew: The Next Astronauts to Orbit the Moon
item.description: NASA is preparing to launch Artemis II, a historic mission marking the first crewed lunar orbit in over 50 years. Scheduled for April 1, 2026, the mission will last approximately ten days and aims to ...

item.title: Bank of Tanzania delays gold sale due to falling global prices
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BoT) has decided to hold back its planned gold sales after noticing a dip in global prices. By early March 2026, BoT had about 19.6 tonnes of gold, almost reaching its 20-tonne g...

item.title: Regina firefighters tackle truck fire in residential driveway
item.description: On April 1, 2026, fire crews in Regina responded to a residential fire after a truck caught fire in a driveway. Emergency services arrived promptly, containing the flames and preventing the fire from ...

item.title: Pakistan signs first bilateral carbon market deal with Norway to boost climate finance
item.description: Pakistan has formally signed its first-ever bilateral carbon market agreement with Norway under the Paris Agreement, marking a significant move towards climate finance and low-carbon growth. The Memor...

item.title: Son testifies against father accused of attempting to kill wife on Hawaii cliff
item.description: Gerhardt Konig, a 47-year-old anaesthesiologist, is on trial in Hawaii for allegedly attempting to push his wife, Arielle Konig, off a cliff at the Nuʻuanu Pali Lookout on 24 March 2025. During the tr...

item.title: Three individuals held following arson attack on Jewish charity ambulances in Golders Green
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have arrested three further individuals in connection with an arson attack targeting Jewish volunteer ambulances in Golders Green, north London. The latest arrests, made in the...

item.title: Pregnant Woman Stabbed in Charlotte Parking Lot by Repeat Offender
item.description: On March 18, 2026, Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender with a history of nine prior convictions, allegedly attacked a 38-year-old pregnant woman in the parking lot of a Harris Teeter grocery store...

item.title: Senators Intervene After Samburu Governor Leaves Senate Committee Over Audit Queries
item.description: On Wednesday, April 1, 2026, a tense scene unfolded outside the Senate chambers involving Samburu Governor Jonathan Leleit and a group of senators led by Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna. The governor had...

item.title: Provincial cricket unions raise concerns over CSA's player contracting system
item.description: Cricket South Africa (CSA) recently introduced the Players of National Interest (PONI) contracts to ease financial pressures on provincial unions, particularly after the heavy demands of the SA A sche...

item.title: Alberta RCMP lift shelter-in-place alert following arrests of three armed suspects
item.description: The Alberta RCMP have lifted a shelter-in-place advisory for Atikameg First Nations and nearby areas, approximately four hours north of Edmonton. The alert was issued late Tuesday evening due to repor...

item.title: Police Appeal for Information to Locate Missing 17-Year-Old I'zeyah Ikupu in Canberra
item.description: I'zeyah Ikupu, a 17-year-old boy, has been reported missing in Canberra for a week. Authorities and his family are concerned for his welfare and have appealed to the public for help. He was last seen ...

item.title: Police Launch Nationwide Operation Against Illegal Vehicle Lights and Exhausts
item.description: Tanzania Police, working together with bodaboda leaders, have started a big operation to remove motorcycles and tuk-tuks fitted with unauthorised lights and modified exhausts. The campaign comes after...

item.title: Current Hyperoptic Broadband Discounts and Offers for April 2026
item.description: The Independent has published an updated guide on the latest Hyperoptic broadband deals and promo codes available in April 2026. The article outlines how UK consumers can save on full-fibre broadband ...

item.title: Nigeria clinches qualification for multiple events at World Athletics Relays
item.description: Team Nigeria shine for real for Lefika International Relays wey hold for Gaborone as dem secure important wins for two out of the four events wey dem compete. Di most outstanding performance na for di...
